title: Plutarch, Moralia: On Listening to Lectures
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: On Listening to Lectures.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: On Listening to Lectures.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'On Listening to Lectures': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
